Politics.headline: US House committee releases videos of the Clintons' Epstein testimonies
Politics.detail: The House Oversight Committee released recordings of last week's depositions with former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton related to the Jeffrey Epstein case.

Politics.headline: 6 U.S. service members killed in Iranian strike in Kuwait, Pentagon says
Politics.detail: The first U.S. casualties of the war with Iran occurred among American personnel based in Kuwait.

Politics.headline: Trump signals willingness to talk to new Iranian leadership as strikes continue
Politics.detail: President Trump said Sunday that he is willing to speak with the new leadership in Iran following the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei.

Politics.headline: Liberals' omnibus budget bill passes final hurdle in the House of Commons
Politics.detail: The Canadian House of Commons passed the Liberals' omnibus budget bill.

Politics.headline: Minister Anand to give a keynote address at the Toronto Region Board of Trade
Politics.detail: The Honourable Anita Anand, Minister of Foreign Affairs, will deliver a keynote address and participate in a fireside chat on the theme of “Canada's Global Strategy: What It Means for Business” on March 3, 2026.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil prices soar and defense stocks gain as US-Israel war with Iran rattles markets
Finance & Economy.detail: Oil prices leaped on worries that war with Iran could clog the flow of crude, while U.S. stocks swung from sharp losses to small gains.

Finance & Economy.headline: Middle East crisis pushes up oil prices – and could drive inflation rises too
Finance & Economy.detail: The escalating conflict in the Middle East is pushing up oil prices, potentially leading to increased inflation.

Finance & Economy.headline: India, Canada sign $2.6 billion uranium deal, target $50 billion trade by 2030 with CEPA push
Finance & Economy.detail: India and Canada have signed a $2.6 billion uranium deal and aim to reach $50 billion in trade by 2030, driven by the Comprehensive Economic Partnership Agreement (CEPA).

Finance & Economy.headline: Maritime insurers cancel war risk cover in Gulf as Iran conflict disrupts shipping
Finance & Economy.detail: Due to the ongoing conflict with Iran, maritime insurers are cancelling war risk cover in the Gulf region, causing disruption to shipping.

Finance & Economy.headline: American homebuyers gain most purchasing power since 2022
Finance & Economy.detail: American homebuyers are experiencing the most significant increase in purchasing power since 2022, providing some relief in a challenging housing market.

Technology.headline: iPhone 17e Is Here
Technology.detail: Apple Adds MagSafe, Doubles Storage, Sticks With 1 Camera. Apple kicked off several days of product announcements, which will culminate in a March 4 'experience' for the press.

Technology.headline: Apple Refreshes iPad Air With M4 Chip, 12GB RAM
Technology.detail: Apple has launched the iPad Air with M4 chip in India today and will go on sale starting March 11.

Technology.headline: Anthropic's Claude AI Takes Apple App Store Top Spot, Dethrones ChatGPT
Technology.detail: Anthropic says its AI is already writing most of its code and reshaping how companies think about talent.

Technology.headline: AI Rapidly Rendering Cyber Defenses Obsolete: Report
Technology.detail: AI adoption is outpacing enterprise security, leaving organizations exposed to machine-speed attacks and unmanaged AI risk, according to a new report.

Technology.headline: Xiaomi 17 and 17 Ultra launching in India on March 11
Technology.detail: Xiaomi has unveiled its latest flagship lineup — the Xiaomi 17 and Xiaomi 17 Ultra — for global markets at MWC 2026 and The series is set to make its India debut on March 11.

Science.headline: 48-Hour Oatmeal Diet Could Cut Cholesterol Levels For Weeks, Study Shows
Science.detail: A new study suggests that a short-term oatmeal diet may lead to sustained reductions in cholesterol levels.

Science.headline: One Simple Trick Could Help Tardigrades Survive in Martian Dirt
Science.detail: Researchers have discovered a method to enhance the survival capabilities of tardigrades, also known as water bears, in Martian soil conditions.

Science.headline: The Microbes in Your Dog's Gut May Predict Their Cancer Prognosis
Science.detail: A recent study indicates that the composition of a dog's gut microbiome could potentially serve as an indicator of their cancer prognosis.

Science.headline: Semaglutide May Reverse Damage Caused by Osteoarthritis, Study Suggests
Science.detail: Research suggests that semaglutide, a medication typically used for diabetes and weight management, might have the potential to reverse damage caused by osteoarthritis.

Science.headline: Simulations of your gut may predict which probiotics will stick
Science.detail: Researchers are developing simulations of the human gut to predict the effectiveness of different probiotics.

Health.headline: Nicole 'Snooki' Polizzi Urges Cervical Cancer Screening After Diagnosis
Health.detail: Nicole "Snooki" Polizzi of the "Jersey Shore" recently announced her stage 1 cervical cancer diagnosis and is using her social media platform to urge others to get screened.

Health.headline: Regular Exercise Lowers Death Risk Across 7 Cancer Types, Study Finds
Health.detail: A new study found that regular physical activity may improve cancer survival rates, with positive effects observed across various cancer types.

Health.headline: Eating high amounts of red meat may raise diabetes risk by as much as…
Health.detail: Research indicates that consuming high quantities of red meat could significantly elevate the risk of developing diabetes.

Health.headline: Prenatal Wildfire Smoke Risk in Infants of Women With Asthma
Health.detail: A recent study has found that prenatal exposure to wildfire smoke may pose risks to infants born to women with asthma.

Health.headline: AI: Doctors must not be replaced by algorithms, European health leaders say
Health.detail: European health leaders are emphasizing that artificial intelligence should not replace doctors.

Sports.headline: Losses to NZ, Aussies force Gilas to recalculate World Cup route
Sports.detail: The Gilas Pilipinas national basketball team is reassessing its strategy for the World Cup after suffering defeats to New Zealand and Australia.

Sports.headline: Lionel Messi, Telasco Segovia rally Inter Miami to 4-2 victory over Orlando City
Sports.detail: Lionel Messi and Telasco Segovia led a comeback victory for Inter Miami, defeating Orlando City with a score of 4-2.

Sports.headline: Three NRL rivals chase Dolphins star Selwyn Cobbo
Sports.detail: Three rival National Rugby League clubs are reportedly attempting to poach Selwyn Cobbo from the Dolphins before he even plays a game for them.

Sports.headline: Giannis Antetokounmpo expected to return in showdown against Celtics
Sports.detail: Giannis Antetokounmpo is expected to return to the Milwaukee Bucks lineup for their game against the Boston Celtics after missing several games due to injury.

Sports.headline: Nine years without Raymond Kopa
Sports.detail: Real Madrid remembers Raymond Kopa, the legendary French forward who passed away on March 3, 2017, highlighting his successful career with the club from 1956 to 1959.

Entertainment.headline: Catherine O'Hara wins posthumous Actor Award for role in The Studio
Entertainment.detail: Catherine O'Hara made history for her posthumous win at the 2026 Actor Awards, marking the first time a female actor has won a posthumous Actor Award; Co-star Seth Rogen called O'Hara both kind and a genius in his speech while accepting the award on her behalf.

Entertainment.headline: Shia LaBeouf 'not into' rehab push, cites 'small man complex' for Mardi Gras brawl
Entertainment.detail: Actor Shia LaBeouf, who was charged with battery after allegedly punching several people outside a New Orleans bar, is reportedly resistant to going to rehab, attributing his behavior to a 'small man complex'.

Entertainment.headline: Eric Dane's Cause of Death Revealed After ALS Battle
Entertainment.detail: The 'Grey's Anatomy' alum, Eric Dane, passed away at the age of 53 after battling ALS.

Entertainment.headline: JFK's Grandson Gives 'Love Story' Series an 'F for Fiction'
Entertainment.detail: JFK's grandson slammed the show for its “grotesque” portrayal of his family.

Entertainment.headline: 'Yellowstone' Spinoff 'Marshals' Kills Off OG Character: Luke Grimes Reacts to Kayce Dutton's Loss
Entertainment.detail: The 'Yellowstone' universe expands with 'Marshals,' starring Luke Grimes, but one original character is killed off.

Crime & Justice.headline: Suspect, four victims dead after stabbing attack in US state of Washington
Crime & Justice.detail: A 32-year-old suspect stabbed four people to death before being shot by a sheriff's deputy near Tacoma, Washington.

Crime & Justice.headline: 2 dead, 14 hurt in Texas bar shooting
Crime & Justice.detail: At least two people were killed and 14 were injured in a mass shooting outside an Austin, Texas, bar, and the FBI is investigating the shooting as a possible terror attack.

Crime & Justice.headline: Third Rhode Island hockey rink shooting victim dies and is identified
Crime & Justice.detail: A third victim has died in the Rhode Island hockey arena shooting allegedly carried out by a transgender suspect who killed his ex-wife and son in a suspected family dispute.

Crime & Justice.headline: Ex-UK ambassador Peter Mandelson arrested over alleged Epstein links
Crime & Justice.detail: Former UK ambassador to the US Peter Mandelson was arrested for alleged misconduct tied to sex offender Jeffrey Epstein.

Crime & Justice.headline: McSkimming hosted woman in police-funded hotel rooms - IPCA
Crime & Justice.detail: Disgraced ex-top cop Jevon McSkimming used police-funded Wellington hotel rooms to host a woman he was having a secret relationship with on up to 10 occasions, according to an investigation. The IPCA found the ex-deputy commissioner breached police policy and the police code of conduct when he invited his later-accuser and complainant, known as Ms Z, to taxpayer-bought hotel rooms.

Education.headline: Ontario teacher, education worker unions call for contract talks to start early
Education.detail: Contracts for Ontario's teachers and education workers expire this summer, and their union leaders are urging the education minister to begin the bargaining process early.

Education.headline: Week In Review: The special education population is on the rise
Education.detail: The special education population is increasing.

Education.headline: Students feel safer in school when their concerns are heard, YouthTruth finds
Education.detail: YouthTruth found that students feel safer in school when their concerns are heard.

Education.headline: House hearing stresses that AI teacher training is a must
Education.detail: A recent House hearing emphasized the necessity of AI training for teachers.

Education.headline: Teachers struggle to afford housing. What are districts doing about it?
Education.detail: Many teachers are facing difficulties in affording housing, prompting questions about the measures school districts are taking to address this issue.

Lifestyle.headline: Lunar Eclipse 2026: Food rules to follow, dos and don'ts during Chandra Grahan
Lifestyle.detail: The year's first total lunar eclipse, a 'Blood Moon,' will occur on March 3, coinciding with Holi, and experts suggest fasting and avoiding certain foods due to heightened energy impacting the body during this celestial event.

Lifestyle.headline: #lifestyle: Waiora Te Ūkaipō Returns: A 30-Year Reflection on Home, Identity and Whakapapa
Lifestyle.detail: Waiora Te Ūkaipō – The Homeland returns to the stage in a landmark 30-year anniversary production, reaffirming the enduring influence of Hone Kouka as one of Aotearoa's most significant playwrights and storytellers, exploring Māori relationships with land, family and belonging.

Lifestyle.headline: Ramadan 2026 focused on student-led programming and collaborative opportunities
Lifestyle.detail: Elon University’s Muslim community will mark Ramadan with student-led programming, and collaborative opportunities, culminating in a campus-wide celebration of Eid al-Fitr on March 31, with events throughout the month creating spaces for prayer, learning and community connection

Lifestyle.headline: Hints from Heloise: Cut tissues in half so box will last
Lifestyle.detail: Heloise shares a tip to cut tissues in half to extend the life of a tissue box and reminds readers to be considerate of others regarding fragrances due to allergies and asthma.

Lifestyle.headline: The best red-carpet fashion at the 2026 Actor Awards
Lifestyle.detail: Fashion looks from the 2026 Actor Awards reimagine Hollywood Glamour.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Foundational learning at DepEd
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The editorial discusses the importance of foundational learning in the Philippines, highlighting the need to build skills, habits, and values in children to shape them into critical thinkers and responsible citizens. It also mentions initiatives to improve literacy and provide resources like books and Wi-Fi in schools.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL - Party-list reforms
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Philippine Star editorial discusses the need for reforms in the party-list system in the Philippines to prevent its corruption and ensure that it truly represents marginalized sectors, highlighting the Commission on Elections' efforts to stop the last-minute substitution of party-list nominees.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Sovereignty for soybeans?
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The Jakarta Post's editorial discusses the importance of reviewing trade agreements to ensure that national sovereignty is not compromised, particularly in the context of the US Supreme Court's ruling on trade matters.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The Guardian view on parliament's role in war on Iran: MPs should vote before Britain gets sucked in
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial emphasizes the importance of parliamentary oversight and a vote in the UK before the country becomes involved in the conflict in Iran.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Taiwan growing, but not spending
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses Taiwan's increasing excess savings despite strong domestic demand, driven by a robust export growth in AI and emerging technologies.

World.headline: Israel-US war on Iran live: fire at US embassy in Riyadh after drone strike; state department urges all Americans to leave Middle East
World.detail: A fire erupted at the US embassy in Riyadh following a drone strike, prompting the State Department to urge all Americans to evacuate the Middle East immediately. Donald Trump says the war could go on for four-five weeks, adding US has 'capability to go far longer'.

World.headline: Afghanistan says it thwarted Pakistan airstrikes on Bagram airbase.
World.detail: Afghanistan reports thwarting Pakistani airstrikes on Bagram airbase amidst sporadic clashes in several provinces, with conflicting death tolls reported by both sides. Pakistan declared a state of 'open war' after bombing major Afghan cities.

World.headline: Three US fighter jets mistakenly shot down over Kuwait.
World.detail: Three US fighter jets were mistakenly shot down over Kuwait. The US military says 1,000 targets hit in Iran; Israel and Hezbollah exchange strikes.

World.headline: Iran conflict expands with strikes in Lebanon, Cyprus.
World.detail: The Iranian conflict has widened to include strikes in Lebanon and Cyprus. Some world leaders are condemning the US and Israel over the decision to attack Iran.

World.headline: Intelligence assessment warns of Iranian attacks on US following Khamenei's death
World.detail: A U.S. intelligence assessment indicates that Iran and its proxies may target the U.S. following the death of Iranian Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei. The threat assessment, produced by the Department of Homeland Security, suggests a potential for targeted attacks on the United States.

Zimbabwe.headline: Madhuku slams Mudenda, rejects 2030 Bill
Zimbabwe.detail: Constitutional lawyer Lovemore Madhuku has criticized Speaker of Parliament Jacob Mudenda and rejected the proposed constitutional amendment that could extend President Mnangagwa's term to 2030. Madhuku argues that legislative authority comes from the people and must be exercised in accordance with the Constitution.

Zimbabwe.headline: ZRP denies role in alleged assault on Madhuku
Zimbabwe.detail: The Zimbabwe Republic Police (ZRP) has denied any involvement in the alleged assault on Professor Lovemore Madhuku, leader of the National Constitutional Assembly (NCA), and other members. This denial comes after reports of an attack on Madhuku and his colleagues during a meeting, with claims that police officers were present but did not intervene.

Zimbabwe.headline: Over 4,000 prisoners set free under Presidential Amnesty
Zimbabwe.detail: More than 4,000 prisoners have been released in Zimbabwe under a Presidential Amnesty. The amnesty is a general pardon for a large group of individuals, usually prisoners.

Zimbabwe.headline: 2 police detectives gunned down by armed robbery suspect, 3 others injured
Zimbabwe.detail: Two police detectives were shot and killed by an armed robbery suspect, and three others were injured. The incident has raised concerns about the safety of law enforcement officers and the prevalence of armed crime.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe cricket team's return home delayed following West Asia airspace closure
Zimbabwe.detail: The Zimbabwe cricket team's return home has been delayed due to the closure of West Asia airspace. This disruption affects travel plans and highlights the impact of regional events on international sports.
